description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have two jobs, linux and windows, each running on a different environment. For linux, use an ubuntu-latest container, install dependencies, download and install the Vulkan SDK, checkout the code, configure CMake with different compilers, build, and upload artifacts. For windows, use a windows-latest environment, install dependencies, download and install the Vulkan SDK, checkout the code, configure CMake with MSVC, build, and upload artifacts.
